ITEM.name: Rusty Dagger
ITEM.desc: It has some rust here and there. Once bought and used, it is sure to be difficult to sell it to others.

ITEM.name: Iron Dagger
ITEM.desc: Easily obtainable dagger. It was made in a factory. A faint serial number is visible on the surface.

ITEM.name: Military Dagger
ITEM.desc: A dagger used in the military when making an assault.

ITEM.name: Light-weight Dagger
ITEM.desc: A very light and easy-to-use Dagger.

ITEM.name: High-end Dagger
ITEM.desc: A high-end dagger that is not from mass production. A beautiful pattern inscribed on the surface by a craftsman stands out. But it seems heavy.

ITEM.name: Phantom Slaying Dagger
ITEM.desc: It is a mysterious dagger said to have been used to kill an evil spirit. However, it is not sure whether it is true or not.

ITEM.name: KEUK-CHO-HON
ITEM.desc: This dagger is used by a very few number of people. It is said that only a very limited number of this dagger has been produced.

ITEM.name: Rusty Sword
ITEM.desc: It is somewhat rusty. It seems difficult to sell it to others once it is bought and used.

ITEM.name: Iron Sword
ITEM.desc: Easily obtainable sword. It was made in a factory. A faint serial number is visible on the surface.

ITEM.name: Military Sword
ITEM.desc: This sword is used in the military. It is said that this weapon is not supplied to the rank or file. It has quite a high-end appearance.

ITEM.name: Light-weight Sword
ITEM.desc: Made easy-to-use lightweight sword.

ITEM.name: High-class Sword
ITEM.desc: This sword is made of high-end materials for special purposes.

ITEM.name: Devil Slayer
ITEM.desc: It is a mysterious sword said to have been used to kill an evil spirit.

ITEM.name: YONG-WOL-RANG
ITEM.desc: This renowned sword is gold plated. The attractive look of this sword makes the sword collector desperately want it.

ITEM.name: Iron Kodachi
ITEM.desc: Kodachi made in a way that it can be used by both hands. Made suitable for the general public.

ITEM.name: Light-weight Kodachi
ITEM.desc: Kodachi made in a way that it can be more easily used by both hands. It is relatively lighter and smaller than the normal one.

ITEM.name: High-end Kodachi
ITEM.desc: This Kodachi is made of high-end materials for special use.

ITEM.name: Red Blood
ITEM.desc: This Kodachi with a scary name is said to have been used by a great swordsman of a long time ago.

ITEM.name: Large Sword
ITEM.desc: Very large sword.

ITEM.name: Raptor 50
ITEM.desc: This pistol has been used from a long time ago in the empire. Its production has been discontinued. Manufacturer: Walcom.

ITEM.name: Raptor 50 x2
ITEM.desc: (Two-handed Weapon) This pistol has been used from a long time ago in the empire. Its production has been discontinued. Manufacturer: Walcom

ITEM.name: Raptor 80
ITEM.desc: A revised model of the Raptor 50. Its performance improved slightly but the appearance has not changed from the old version. Its production was announced to be stopped quite early as its competition released a new product. Manufacturer: Walcom

ITEM.name: Raptor 80 x2
ITEM.desc: (Two-handed Weapon) A revised model of the Raptor 50. Its performance improved slightly but the appearance has not changed from the old version. Manufacturer: Walcom

ITEM.name: Raven 5
ITEM.desc: This pistol was produced to be supplied to the battlefront of the Republic. Manufacturer: Maxwell

ITEM.name: Raven 5 x2
ITEM.desc: (Two-handed Weapon) This pistol was produced to be supplied to the battle front of the Republic. Manufacturer: Maxwell

ITEM.name: Raptor 120
ITEM.desc: It was developed to be supplied to the military. Its controlability has improved from the Raptor 80. Manufacturer: Walcom

ITEM.name: Raptor 120 x2
ITEM.desc: (Two-handed Weapon) It was developed to be supplied to the military. Its control was improved compared with the Raptor 80. Manufacturer: Walcom

ITEM.name: Raven 6
ITEM.desc: The follow-up model of the Raven 5. It's performance has improved but its manufacturer failed to make it light. Manufacturer: Maxwell

ITEM.name: Raven 6 x2
ITEM.desc: (Two-handed Weapon) Follow-up model of Raven 5. Its performance has improved but failed to make it light. Manufacturer: Maxwell

ITEM.name: Raptor 160
ITEM.desc: The follow-up model - Raptor 120. It has a more powerful performance and excellent repeat fire rate.

ITEM.name: Raptor 160 x2
ITEM.desc: (Two-handed Weapon) Follow-up model of Raptor 120. It has a more powerful performance and excellent repeat fire rate.

ITEM.name: Raven 7
ITEM.desc: This Raven 7 has reinforced fire power. It has more fire power and repeat fire rate. But it still has some drawbacks in terms of the control power and weight.

ITEM.name: Raven 7 x2
ITEM.desc: (Two-handed Weapon) This Raven 7 has reinforced fire power. It has better fire power and repeat fire rate. But it still has some drawbacks in terms of the control power and weight.

ITEM.name: Raptor 200
ITEM.desc: Raptor Series won confidence with a high firing accuracy. This weapon shows the advanced development capability of Walcom.

ITEM.name: Raptor 200 x2
ITEM.desc: (Two-handed Weapon) Raptor Series won confidence with a high firing accuracy. This weapon shows the advanced development capability of Walcom.

ITEM.name: Minic 567
ITEM.desc: This legendary revolver was produced by Maxwell and supplied to the general infantry of the Republic. Its production is discontinued now.

ITEM.name: Minic 567 x2
ITEM.desc: (Two-handed Weapon) This legendary revolver was produced by Maxwell and supplied to the general infantry of the Republic. Its production is discontinued now.

ITEM.name: Dynax 7000
ITEM.desc: The initial version of lightweight revolver of Canox. Its production is discontinued. Though it is not produced anymore, the second-hand Dynax is frequently transacted.

ITEM.name: Dynax 7000 x2
ITEM.desc: (Two-handed Weapon) The initial version of lightweight revolver of Canox. Its production is discontinued. Though it is no longer produced, the second-hand Dynax is frequently transacted.

ITEM.name: Minic 567 Limited
ITEM.desc: This model was produced in order to commemorate the fifth anniversary of Maxwell's Minic. It has a higher safety and power than the original one.

ITEM.name: Minic 567 Limited x2
ITEM.desc: (Two-handed Weapon) This model was produced in order to commemorate the fifth anniversary of Maxwell's Minic. It has a higher safety and power than the original one.

ITEM.name: Zaurus A
ITEM.desc: This revolver was developed by Walcom to be supplied to the military.

ITEM.name: Zaurus A x2
ITEM.desc: (Two-handed Weapon) This Revolver was developed by Walcom to be supplied to the military.

ITEM.name: Phantom Cruise
ITEM.desc: High-end revolver made by Nico. Its upgraded design drew keen attention.

ITEM.name: Phantom Cruise x2
ITEM.desc: (Two-handed Weapon) High-end revolver made by Nico. Its upgraded design drew keen attention.

ITEM.name: Phantom Cruise N
ITEM.desc: Phantom Cruise's slightly upgraded model. Its performance has slightly improved.

ITEM.name: Phantom Cruise N x2
ITEM.desc: (Two-handed Weapon) Phantom Cruise's minor upgraded model. Its performance has slightly improved.

ITEM.name: Dynax 8000
ITEM.desc: Canox' Lightweight Revolver. As a follow-up model of Dynax 7000, its performance has remarkably improved.

ITEM.name: Dynax 8000 x2
ITEM.desc: (Two-handed Weapon) Canox' Lightweight Revolver. As a follow-up model of Dynax 7000, its performance has remarkably improved.

ITEM.name: Minic 567 MK.II
ITEM.desc: This model was produced in order to commemorate the fifth anniversary of Maxwell's Minic. It has a higher safety and power than the original one.

ITEM.name: Minic 567 MK.II x2
ITEM.desc: (Two-handed Weapon) This model was produced in order to commemorate the fifth anniversary of Maxwell's Minic. It has a higher safety and power than the original one.

ITEM.name: Zaurus B
ITEM.desc: The Zaurus Type B boasts strong power. It has better firing accuracy.

ITEM.name: Zaurus B x2
ITEM.desc: (Two-handed Weapon) The Zaurus Type B boasts strong power. It has better firing accuracy.

ITEM.name: Renard
ITEM.desc: This old submachine gun produced by Canox has been used for a long time. Its production has been discontinued.

ITEM.name: Renard x2
ITEM.desc: (Two-handed Weapon) This old submachine gun produced by Canox has been used for a long time. Its production has been discontinued.

ITEM.name: Walcom S5
ITEM.desc: This submachine gun produced by Walcom is quite popular with better fire power and better capacity to load more bullets.

ITEM.name: Walcom S5 x2
ITEM.desc: (Two-handed Weapon) This submachine gun produced by Walcom is quite popular with better fire power and better capacity to load more bullets.

ITEM.name: Ellan
ITEM.desc: Canox's small submachine gun. This is manufactured with a focus on better portability.

ITEM.name: Ellan x2
ITEM.desc: (Two-handed Weapon) Canox's small submachine gun. This is manufactured with a focus on better portability.

ITEM.name: Renard V
ITEM.desc: Follow-up model of the once widely-popular Renard. It has better controllability and repeat fire rate.

ITEM.name: Renard V x2
ITEM.desc: (Two-handed Weapon) Follow-up model of the once widely popular Renard. It has better controllability and repeat fire rate.

ITEM.name: Walcom S6
ITEM.desc: Follow-up model of Walcom's S5. It has better fire power and stability compared with its previous model.

ITEM.name: Walcom S6 x2
ITEM.desc: (Two-handed Weapon) Follow-up model of Walcom's S5. It has better fire power and stability compared with its previous model.

ITEM.name: New Renard V
ITEM.desc: New version of the popular Renard V produced by Canox.

ITEM.name: New Renard V x2
ITEM.desc: (Two-handed Weapon) New version of the popular Renard V produced by Canox.

ITEM.name: Walcom XL
ITEM.desc: This model was produced in order to commemorate the 70th anniversary of Walcom. It has a light-weight body and it is called 'the minor grade version of S6.'

ITEM.name: Walcom XL x2
ITEM.desc: (Two-handed Weapon) This model was produced in order to commemorate the 70th anniversary of Walcom. It has a light-weight body and it is called minor grade version of S6.

ITEM.name: Renard VI
ITEM.desc: This new model was produced by Canox whose popularity was dented by Walcom XL.

ITEM.name: Renard VI x2
ITEM.desc: (Two-handed Weapon) This new model was produced by Canox whose popularity was dented by Walcom XL.

ITEM.name: Walcom XLS
ITEM.desc: New model produced by Walcom who attempted to take advantage of Walcom XL. Its only difference from the old model is better fire power.

ITEM.name: Walcom XLS x2
ITEM.desc: (Two-handed Weapon) New model produced by Walcom who attempted to take advantage of Walcom XL. Its only difference from the old model is better fire power.

ITEM.name: Breaker 3
ITEM.desc: Pump action-type shotgun produced by Leonics that specializes in the production of shotguns for ages. Its production has been discontinued.

ITEM.name: Breaker 5
ITEM.desc: Pump action type shotgun produced by Leonics. Though produced a long time ago, it is still very popular.

ITEM.name: Breaker 6
ITEM.desc: Leonics' new shotgun that was released quite recently.

ITEM.name: Breaker 7
ITEM.desc: Leonics's 7th model adopted a new design different from the existing breaker series.

ITEM.name: Avenger
ITEM.desc: Shotgun introduced by Nico as a monumental product. This weapon has strong destructive power. It has a drawback - it can load a small number of bullets.

ITEM.name: Breaker 8
ITEM.desc: New shotgun produced by Leonics, which is quite famous for the breaker series of shotguns.

ITEM.name: Avenger MK.II
ITEM.desc: Avenger's follow-up model that took the adventurers by shock.

ITEM.name: Nico R2
ITEM.desc: Rifle produced by Nico in early days.

ITEM.name: Nico R5
ITEM.desc: One of the most popular rifles among the Republican army.

ITEM.name: Walcom Warrior 77
ITEM.desc: Produced by Walcom, it has the drawback of being difficult to use but it has relatively strong power.

ITEM.name: Maxwell LX30
ITEM.desc: Produced by Maxwell, this weapon has stable grip, good operability, and high repeat rate.

ITEM.name: Nico R6
ITEM.desc: Follow-up model of popular R5 of Nico. With its improved fire power, it is popular among R5 maniacs.

ITEM.name: Maxwell LX44
ITEM.desc: (Discontinued Item) Rifle with a higher repeat rate than LX30. It has a stable grip with high accuracy.

ITEM.name: Nico R7
ITEM.desc: Nico's new rifle with better fire power.

ITEM.name: Walcom Warrior 88
ITEM.desc: Is still not easy to use but this new product of Walcom is produced with a focus on stronger fire power.

ITEM.name: Nico MG-K8
ITEM.desc: It is so heavy that it is hard to carry but its power of repeated shooting maked the enemies shiver in fear.

ITEM.name: Nico MG-K9
ITEM.desc: K9 machine gun with upgraded power. Its powerful serial shooting speed and controllability earned it the name, 'Firepower of Horror'.

ITEM.name: Nico MG-KX
ITEM.desc: Nico's new machine gun with explosive power. Even just facing the MG-KX will make the enemy feel pain.

ITEM.name: Maxwell RW-66
ITEM.desc: Rocket launcher made in early days by Maxwell. It does not have a strong power.

ITEM.name: Walcom L1
ITEM.desc: Rocket launcher of strong power produced by Walcom.

ITEM.name: Maxwell RW-77
ITEM.desc: Rocket launcher produced by Maxwell. It has more number of bullets than Walcom's L series and better repeated shooting capability. However, fire power was sacrificed instead.

ITEM.name: Walcom L1 mk. II
ITEM.desc: Walcom's Rocket Launcher. This slightly upgraded model of L1 has slightly better rocket power.

ITEM.name: Maxwell RW-88
ITEM.desc: An upgraded version of RW-77. Though nothing has changed, it has better repeated shooting power.

ITEM.name: Walcom L2
ITEM.desc: Walcom's Rocket Launcher. With more bullets than L1, it has become more powerful weapon. It got lighter as well.

ITEM.name: SniferRifle1
ITEM.desc: Sniper Rifle produced by Bird.

ITEM.name: Canox FG1
ITEM.desc: New grenade produced by Canox in a way that it can be easily used indoors. 2 units

ITEM.name: Canox FG2
ITEM.desc: New grenade produced by Canox in a way that it can be easily used indoors. 3 units

ITEM.name: Canox FG3
ITEM.desc: New grenade produced by Canox in a way that it can be easily used indoors. 4 units

ITEM.name: Canox FG4
ITEM.desc: New grenade produced by Canox in a way that it can be easily used indoors. 5 units

ITEM.name: Canox FG5
ITEM.desc: New grenade produced by Canox in a way that it can be easily used indoors. 6 units

ITEM.name: Canox FB1
ITEM.desc: Flash bomb. This weapon can temporarily paralyse enemies' vision and hearing. 2 units

ITEM.name: Canox FB2
ITEM.desc: Flash bomb. This weapon can temporarily paralyse enemies' vision and hearing. 3 units

ITEM.name: Canox FB3
ITEM.desc: Flash bomb. This weapon can temporarily paralyse enemies' vision and hearing. 4 units

ITEM.name: Canox FB4
ITEM.desc: Flash bomb. This weapon can temporarily paralyse enemies' vision and hearing. 5 units

ITEM.name: Canox FB5
ITEM.desc: Flash bomb. This weapon can temporarily paralyse enemies' vision and hearing. 6 units

ITEM.name: Canox SG1
ITEM.desc: Smoke bomb. This is used to disrupt the sight of the enemy with smoke. 3 units

ITEM.name: Canox SG2
ITEM.desc: Smoke bomb. This is used to disrupt the sight of the enemy with smoke. 4 units

ITEM.name: Canox SG3
ITEM.desc: Smoke bomb. This is used to disrupt the sight of the enemy with smoke. 5 units

ITEM.name: Canox SG4
ITEM.desc: Smoke bomb. This is used to disrupt the sight of the enemy with smoke. 6 units

ITEM.name: Canox SG5
ITEM.desc: Smoke bomb. This is used to disrupt the sight of the enemy with smoke. 7 units

ITEM.name: Medical Kit MK-1
ITEM.desc: This enables you to recover the physical strength. 2 units

ITEM.name: Medical Kit MK-2
ITEM.desc: This enables you to recover the physical strength. 3 units

ITEM.name: Medical Kit MK-3
ITEM.desc: This enables you to recover the physical strength. 4 units

ITEM.name: Repair Kit RK-1
ITEM.desc: Repairs defense tools. It repairs broken defense weapons. 2 units

ITEM.name: Repair Kit RK-2
ITEM.desc: Repairs defense tools. It repairs broken defense weapons. 3 units

ITEM.name: Repair Kit RK-3
ITEM.desc: Repairs defense tools. It repairs broken defense weapons. 4 units

ITEM.name: Ring of the Citizen
ITEM.desc: This ring does not look so beautiful. It was produced by the mayor for commemoration.

ITEM.name: Ring of the Crying Hawk
ITEM.desc: This ring is said to have been supplied to some special combat forces famous in the legends.

ITEM.name: Warrior's Cry
ITEM.desc: This small ring seems to contain the wishes of the many people who longed for a return to home alive.

ITEM.name: Pierre's Ring
ITEM.desc: This ring was produced in order to cherish the memory of a brave commander who was killed in a battle.

ITEM.name: FMT Ring
ITEM.desc: This ring was produced in order to commemorate scientists who created a system named FMT. There is a faint signature of McField inscribed in the jewel.

ITEM.name: Ring of Good Fortune
ITEM.desc: It does not look beautiful, but calls for good luck. People who wear this ring feel that they are much lighter.

ITEM.name: Altema's Ring
ITEM.desc: This ring is produced by TEAMI in order to commemorate the achievement that Emperor Altema made.

ITEM.name: Band of the Blood
ITEM.desc: A pretty ring with a beautiful red jewel. It is said to give its wearer energy.

ITEM.name: Elia's Ring
ITEM.desc: This ring was produced to commemorate the princess, Elia under the order of the Emperor Altema. This rings gives its wearer confidence.

ITEM.name: Ring of a Feather
ITEM.desc: This ring is said to have been made of the feather of a legendary bird. This makes its wearer feel much lighter.

ITEM.name: Ares Running Shirt
ITEM.desc: Men's running shirt produced by Ares, a supplier of military outfits.

ITEM.name: Renaut Cotton Shirt
ITEM.desc: Very active men's cotton shirt produced by Renaut Sports.

ITEM.name: Venico Leather Coat
ITEM.desc: Men's Leather Coat produced by Venico

ITEM.name: Vinz Winter Jacket
ITEM.desc: This leather-fabric jacket for men has good thermal insulation.

ITEM.name: Miz Leather Coat
ITEM.desc: Quite fashionable and stylish men's trench coat produced by Miz, formal suit maker Ares Military Jacket A.

ITEM.name: Ares Military Jacket
ITEM.desc: Military jacket that Ares produced to supply to the military.

ITEM.name: Vinz Long Coat
ITEM.desc: Long wool coat produced by Vinz for men.

ITEM.name: Renaut's Summer Shirt
ITEM.desc: Men's shirt with flower patterns produced by Renaut for summer.

ITEM.name: Flex Cotton T-Shirt
ITEM.desc: Cotton T-Shirt exclusively for women. This product is especially suitable for active women.

ITEM.name: Urike Leather Jacket
ITEM.desc: Urike Women's Leather Jacket quite popular with the elastic fabric.

ITEM.name: Arona Leather Jacket
ITEM.desc: Fashionable leather jacket for women.

ITEM.name: Rex Military Vest
ITEM.desc: Women's military vest, which ensures good sport activity and survival in a combat.

ITEM.name: L* Leather Coat
ITEM.desc: Women's coat with luxury look produced by L*.

ITEM.name: Rex Military Jacket
ITEM.desc: Women's military jacket supplied by Rex.

ITEM.name: Urike Long Coat
ITEM.desc: Women's stylish long coat, a new product of Urike.

ITEM.name: Bics Summer Top
ITEM.desc: Women's flower patterned top for summer produced by Bics.

ITEM.name: Ares Combat Gloves
ITEM.desc: Miz men's leather gloves which are popular with comfortable and simple design.

ITEM.name: Vinz Winter Gloves
ITEM.desc: Winter gloves that protect your hands from the wind and cold. For men.

ITEM.name: Ares Iron Gloves
ITEM.desc: Men's iron gloves with excellent defensive power designed to be used in combat.

ITEM.name: Miz Sheep Leather Gloves
ITEM.desc: Gloves made of durable leather.

ITEM.name: Renaut Summer Gloves
ITEM.desc: Men's gloves that are made by Renaut for summer.

ITEM.name: Rex Combat Gloves
ITEM.desc: Simple, elastic leather gloves

ITEM.name: Arona Winter Leather Gloves
ITEM.desc: Leather gloves to protect from cold.

ITEM.name: Rex Iron Gloves
ITEM.desc: Women's iron gloves designed to be used in combat.

ITEM.name: Urike Sheep Leather Gloves
ITEM.desc: Women's iron gloves designed to be used in combat.

ITEM.name: Bics Summer Gloves
ITEM.desc: Bics' Women's Gloves for summer.

ITEM.name: Vinz Training Pants
ITEM.desc: Men's trousers by Vinz with an emphasis on the excellent elasticity and good feel and touch.

ITEM.name: Ares Military Trousers
ITEM.desc: Military trousers that Ares supplies to the military.

ITEM.name: Renaut's Sporty Pants
ITEM.desc: Trousers presented by Renaut Sportswear for sportsmen.

ITEM.name: Venico Denim Trousers
ITEM.desc: Venico's denim angle band trousers for men with unique touch and feel.

ITEM.name: Miz Leather Trousers
ITEM.desc: Leather trousers in a sophisticated design. Using natural leather, they have a sleek and clean cut and sewing.

ITEM.name: Webs Blue Jeans
ITEM.desc: Blue Jeans produced by Webs. Suitable for tough adventurers.

ITEM.name: Renaut Summer Shorts
ITEM.desc: Men's swimming trousers for summer produced by Renaut.

ITEM.name: Flex Training Pants
ITEM.desc: Flex' women's trousers with excellent elasticity and good touch and feel.

ITEM.name: Rex Military Trousers
ITEM.desc: Women's military trousers produced by Rex.

ITEM.name: Arona Women's Blue Jeans
ITEM.desc: (Discontinued Item) Blue jeans widely worn by all, young and old. For women.

ITEM.name: Rex Military Trousers
ITEM.desc: Comfortable military trousers especially designed for female soldiers.

ITEM.name: L* Black Cotton Slacks
ITEM.desc: (Discontinued Item) Cotton trousers with luxurious touch that L* presents for special females.

ITEM.name: Arona Women's Blue Jeans
ITEM.desc: Blue jeans widely worn by all, young and old. For women.

ITEM.name: Vinz Chamois Trousers
ITEM.desc: Women's Chamois trousers with good feel and touch produced by Vinz.

ITEM.name: L* Black Cotton Slacks
ITEM.desc: Cotton trousers (new) with luxurious touch that L* presents for special females.

ITEM.name: Urike Cotton Slacks
ITEM.desc: Stylish cotton trousers made by Urike. Added practical touch and stylish look using coarse fabric.

ITEM.name: Bics Summer Pants
ITEM.desc: Women's swimming trousers for summer produced by Bics.

ITEM.name: Ares Combat Shoes
ITEM.desc: High-end shoes with comfortable touch for dynamic activity.

ITEM.name: Venico Casual Shoes
ITEM.desc: Casual shoes popular with a unique design

ITEM.name: Renaut Climbing Shoes
ITEM.desc: Made of sturdy leather, these shoes do not tear no matter how tough the terrain that they trod.

ITEM.name: Ares Iron Boots
ITEM.desc: These heavy shoes are made for those who put great value on the defense power.

ITEM.name: Vinz Casual Shoes
ITEM.desc: Very sturdy casual-looking shoes produced by Vinz.

ITEM.name: Renaut Summer Sandals
ITEM.desc: Men's sandals for summer made by Renaut.

ITEM.name: Urike Leather Shoes
ITEM.desc: Artificial leather shoes with a plain touch and feel.

ITEM.name: Rex Combat Shoes
ITEM.desc: Combat shoes specially made for female soldiers by Rex.

ITEM.name: L* Leather Boots
ITEM.desc: High-class leather boots L* is very proud of

ITEM.name: Rex Iron Boots
ITEM.desc: Though look heavy, these shoes are made for those who put great value to defensive power.

ITEM.name: Urike Leather Shoes
ITEM.desc: Leather shoes with unique touch and feel produced by Urike.

ITEM.name: Bics Summer Sandals
ITEM.desc: Women's Sandals for summer produced by Bics

ITEM.name: Goblin Dagger
ITEM.desc: Dagger used by Goblin.

ITEM.name: Goblin Rifle
ITEM.desc: Rifle used by Goblin.

ITEM.name: Goblin Mace
ITEM.desc: Mace used by the Chief Goblin.

ITEM.name: Goblin Wand
ITEM.desc: Wand used by the Chief Goblin.

ITEM.name: Goblin Great Hammer
ITEM.desc: Great Hammer used by Goblin the King.

ITEM.name: Ring of Apology
ITEM.desc: (Event Item) Ring of apology. Drawback: a bit heavy.

ITEM.name: BUG-FREE Coat for Men
ITEM.desc: (Event Item) Men's coat that only those adventurers who helped dispel the abnormal phenomena of the Astra world can wear.

ITEM.name: BUG-FREE Coat for Women
ITEM.desc: (Event Item) Women's coat that only those adventurers who helped dispel the abnormal phenomena of the Astra world can wear.

ITEM.name: Staff Jacket for Men
ITEM.desc: (Event Item) Jackets for the operation staff.

ITEM.name: Staff Jacket for Women
ITEM.desc: (Event Item) Jackets for operation staff.

ITEM.name: Cheater's Ring
ITEM.desc: (Event Item) Golden ring. The letter of ‘My Precious' is inscribed inside.

ITEM.name: Triangle Seaweed-rolled Rice
ITEM.desc: (Event Item) Triagle shaped rice rolls wrapped by seaweed. They look yummy. It can help you recover HP and AP slightly at once.

ITEM.name: Adventurer Dagger
ITEM.desc: Light-weight practical dagger for adventurers.

ITEM.name: Koden Knife
ITEM.desc: A dagger in a unique shape designed by a legendary swordsman.

ITEM.name: Black Martial Dagger
ITEM.desc: An odd dagger handed down from the ancient times.

ITEM.name: Ridic Hunter Dagger
ITEM.desc: (Available during a certain period only) Ridic's Dagger. This strange dagger raises AP for the person who wears it.

ITEM.name: Adventurer Long Sword
ITEM.desc: A light-weight practical sword for adventurers.

ITEM.name: Salamanda
ITEM.desc: A sword in a unique shape designed by a legendary swordsman.

ITEM.name: Black Karma
ITEM.desc: An odd sword handed down from the ancient times.

ITEM.name: Adventurer Pistol x2
ITEM.desc: A pistol mainly used by novice adventurers.

ITEM.name: Ridic Hunter Pistol x2
ITEM.desc: (Available during a certain period only) Ridic hunter's pistol. This strange pistol raises AP for the person who wears it.

ITEM.name: Iris Pistol x2
ITEM.desc: A pistol that the Republic's soldiers had used. It was named after their residence.

ITEM.name: Iron Crow Pistol x2
ITEM.desc: A pistol used in Iron Crow, the center of the Havani, main city for outlaws.

ITEM.name: Iris Revolver x2
ITEM.desc: Revolver that the Republic's soldiers had used. It was named after their residence.

ITEM.name: Iron Crow Revolver x2
ITEM.desc: Revolver used in Iron Crow, the center of the Havani, main city for outlaws.

ITEM.name: Adventurer SMG x2
ITEM.desc: SMG mainly used by the novice adventurers. It seems that merchants remodel the Renard's Magazine illegally and then sell them in the market.

ITEM.name: Iris SMG x2
ITEM.desc: SMG that the Republic's soldiers had used. It was named after their residence.

ITEM.name: Iron Crow SMG x2
ITEM.desc: SMG used in Iron Crow, the center of the Havani, main city for outlaws.

ITEM.name: Iris Shotgun
ITEM.desc: Shotgun that the Republic's soldiers had used. It was named after their residence.

ITEM.name: Iron Crow Shotgun
ITEM.desc: Shotgun used in Iron Crow, the center of the Havani, main city for outlaws.

ITEM.name: Iris Rifle
ITEM.desc: Rifle that the Republic's soldiers had used. It was named after their residence.

ITEM.name: Iron Crow Rifle
ITEM.desc: Rifle used in Iron Crow, the center of the Havani, main city for outlaws.

ITEM.name: Iron Crow Machine Gun
ITEM.desc: Machine Gun used in Iron Crow, the center of the Havani, main city for outlaws.

ITEM.name: Iris Rocket
ITEM.desc: Rocket used by Republic’s soldiers. It was named after their residence.

ITEM.name: Iron Crow Rocket
ITEM.desc: Rocket the Iron Crow used that dominated the city of outlaws, Havana.

ITEM.name: Clover Ring
ITEM.desc: A ring with the symbol of the luck (clover) inside the crystal. Its wearer would see its maximum weight increase.

ITEM.name: Ring Commemorating Iron Cavalry
ITEM.desc: This ring said to have been given to the Iron Cavalry. You may understand why those magicians of the ancient times devised the ring of this mighty power when you consider the heavy weapons that they carry.

ITEM.name: Ring of the Great Emperor
ITEM.desc: This ring is said to have been made for the Great Emperor of Ryswick. The person who wears this ring with mysterious power is affected by the strong power of the ancient magic.

ITEM.name: Ares Military Hat
ITEM.desc: Ares supplies this hat to the military. Perfect match for the Ares military outlook.

ITEM.name: Rank Ceremonial Dress Hat
ITEM.desc: Ceremonial Dress Hat that the ranks of the Empire wear at important ceremonies.

ITEM.name: Men's Gunners' Heaven Soft Hat
ITEM.desc: A soft Hat exclusively for the Gunners' Heaven, a private organization at the Republic. It would look good on dark-colored coat.

ITEM.name: Men's Military-Look Head Covering
ITEM.desc: An easy-to-wear men's head covering. It can also be used to disguise yourself at battlefield.

ITEM.name: Men's Head Covering with no Pattern
ITEM.desc: A simple Men's Head Covering. It is sometimes used as fashion accessories as well.

ITEM.name: Men's Head Covering with the Water Drop Pattern
ITEM.desc: A light and easy-to-wear men's head covering. There are cute water drop patterns embroidered on the red fabric.

ITEM.name: Men's Head Covering with Star Pattern
ITEM.desc: Star patterned men's head covering with unique touch and feel.

ITEM.name: Men's Eternal Blue Hat
ITEM.desc: A men's uniform hat for Eternal Blue, outlaw at the sea.

ITEM.name: Men's Adventurer Hat
ITEM.desc: A light men's hat recommended for the novice adventurers and those who hate a heavy outfit and equipment.

ITEM.name: Men's Blue Whistle Hat
ITEM.desc: A men's hat for Blue Whistle, called the headache of the Empire.

ITEM.name: Men's Ipot Hat
ITEM.desc: A hat for cool guys on a hot summer beach.

ITEM.name: Men's Iron Crow Hat
ITEM.desc: An Iron Crow men's hat worn in Iron Crow, the center of the Havani, main city for outlaws.

ITEM.name: Men's Santa Claus Hat
ITEM.desc: A Christmas season item. For men.

ITEM.name: Men's Phantom Breed Head Covering
ITEM.desc: A men's head covering for a spy organization handed down from the ancient times. It is somewhat heavy.

ITEM.name: Republic Gun Priest Hat
ITEM.desc: A men's hat for a secret organization related with religious groups. It is light-weight.

ITEM.name: Men's Gray Dust Hat
ITEM.desc: A men's Uniform Hat for Gray Dust, elite troops of the Empire.

ITEM.name: Men's LOK Hat
ITEM.desc: Men's LOK Hat.

ITEM.name: Rex Military Hat
ITEM.desc: A military hat for female soldiers. Produced by Rex, this hat is a perfect match for the Rex Military outfit.

ITEM.desc: A pretty hat supplied to the general female soldiers of the Empire.

ITEM.name: Canopus' Coin
ITEM.desc: A coin empowered by the God of Flame, Canopus.

ITEM.name: Canopus' Hand Stamp

ITEM.name: Canopus' Medal
ITEM.desc: A medal empowered by the God of Flame, Canopus.

ITEM.name: Canopus' Eye
ITEM.desc: An eye empowered by the God of Flame, Canopus.
